data.raceName: TOTALLY WORKWEAR CENTRAL COAST SUPER F&M
data.raceComments: {"comment":"8. MIMI'S looked in need of her resuming run last start when finishing fifth of eight over 1100m at Hawkesbury after leading into the turn. Racing in a fitter state rates well as a leading chance. 5. DOLCE VITA has not raced since her debut when she finished last of five over 1100m at this track after having made a poor beginning. She placed second of 10 in a recent trial over 900m at Rosehill and fresh-up should be figuring in the finish. 1. CHAMPERE resumes from a spell following a second of nine over 1300m at Randwick Kensington after having raced on the speed to the turn. Following a recent 10-runner trial over 900m will be well supported to take this race out. 4. ASK DI has not raced since her debut run when she finished eighth of nine over 1000m at Hawkesbury when well supported. Placed third of eight over 900m in a recent Rosehill trial and has top three claims.","runners":[8,5,1,4],"exclusive":true}
